title: adesmia rahmeri
intro: Adesmia rahmeri, also known as Peruvian clover or rahmera, is a flowering plant native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support kidney and urinary tract health, as well as its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Adesmia rahmeri include reducing the risk of kidney stones, alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, and helping to lower blood pressure. Adesmia rahmeri is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional herbal practices, it is also used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
